reasons.quality: The quality doesn't meet my expectations
reasons.temporary: I need to pause for now

expensive.title: What if price wasn't the issue?
expensive.subtitle: We know investing in tools has to make sense. So we put together something special just for you:

notUsing.title: You might not have discovered the best of The AI Model Lab yet.
notUsing.subtitle: 90% of our top-earning creators use features you may not have explored. Let us give you a chance to test everything:

quality.title: We've just upgraded our models.
quality.subtitle: Our team is constantly improving generation quality. Want to try the improvements on us with extra credits?

competitor.title: Before you go, see what only The AI Model Lab does.
competitor.subtitle: Motion Control, Face Swap and AI Video in 4K are exclusive to our platform. How about extra credits to put everything to the test before you decide?

temporary.title: How about pausing instead of canceling?
temporary.subtitle: Freeze your subscription for up to 30 days. No charges, no lost data. When you come back, everything will be exactly where you left it.

default.title: We'd love to keep you with us.
default.subtitle: Before you go, how about an exclusive offer to keep creating professional content?

achievements.title: You've built something incredible here.
achievements.subtitleWithDays: Over the last {days} days, you've created professional content with The AI Model Lab.
achievements.subtitleNoDays: Look at what you've already accomplished with The AI Model Lab.
achievements.footer: Your digital influencers are ready to work for you. Are you sure you want to lose access to all of this?

loss.title: Here's what you lose if you leave.
loss.cancelIntro: If you cancel your subscription, you'll lose access to:
loss.accessEndSuffix: . After that, you'll lose everything listed above.

reason.title: Help us improve.
reason.subtitle: Knowing the reason helps us build a better platform for everyone.
reason.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us more about your decision (optional)

final.title: Final confirmation.
final.cancelWhenDefault: at the end of the current period
final.downgradeBody: Your plan will change from {current} to {target} on the next renewal.

cancel.creditsReset: Your credits revert to the Free plan
cancel.watermark: New generations will include a watermark
cancel.lowPriority: You lose priority in the generation queue

downgrade.featuresRemoved: Features exclusive to your current plan will be removed

final.reactivate: You can reactivate any time before <accent>{date}</accent>.
final.keep: Changed my mind, keep my plan
